title: StackPicks · shadcn/ui — copy-paste React components

rows.title: Not a library — your code
rows.desc: Components copied into your repo. You fork, edit, own everything.

rows.title: Tailwind v4 + React 19 ready
rows.desc: Unified Radix UI under the hood. Works on Next.js, Vite, Astro, TanStack.

rows.title: 50+ accessible components
rows.desc: Dark-mode default. New 'Rhea' style for dense product UIs (Feb 2026).

install.body: Pick what you need. Component files drop into your repo. Edit anything. No version lock-in.

rows.title: vs MUI / Chakra
rows.desc: Heavy CSS-in-JS runtimes. shadcn is just JSX + Tailwind. Lighter.

rows.title: vs raw Radix UI
rows.desc: Radix has zero styling. shadcn = Radix + sane styles you can edit.

rows.title: vs daisyUI
rows.desc: daisy is Tailwind classes. shadcn is real React components. More control.

take.use_if: You're building a serious React app on Tailwind. You want components you can fork, theme, and ship. shadcn is the only sane choice in 2026.
take.skip_if: You don't use Tailwind. Or you want a sealed library you never touch — shadcn is the opposite of that.

more.body: Magic UI · Aceternity · Tremor · Radix · Park UI. Curated takes on each.
more.sub: 14 picks · all open source · updated this week

caption_line: shadcn/ui — components you actually own. Tailwind v4 + React 19 ready. The new standard for React apps in 2026. Comment SHADCN for the docs ↓
